case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3220 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: POS OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF TERRY COLLINS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RESPONDENT TERRY COLLINS'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF TERRY COLLINS IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA COLLINS, TERRY

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLIAM OF TERRY COLLINS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO VACATE ORDER GRANTING MTN TO STRIKE CLAIM OF TERRY COLLINS CONTINUED FROM JUL-27-2010 TO LAW AND MOTION AT AUG-25-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER WRITTEN AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. (302)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $805.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CHE HASHIM ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT TERRY COLLINS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,415.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF TERRY COLLINS. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797
